name: Paraná Basin
depletionRate: Low — Guarani Aquifer provides deep groundwater buffer
description: The Paraná-La Plata system drains southeastern South America including parts of Brazil, Paraguay, Argentina, and Uruguay. The Guarani Aquifer — one of the world's largest — underlies much of the basin. Soy and cattle expansion are converting cerrado and Atlantic Forest, increasing runoff variability and sediment loads.
